chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI SMA NO.133/2018 Date Order with signature of Judge FOR ORDERS ON CMA.250/2019 08.04.2019 Ms. Riffat Bano advocate for petitioner ---------------------------------- Through this application the petitioner seeks exemption from furnishing surety as per rule as the petitioner despite her best efforts unable to arrange the same. She, however, is ready to deposit original title documents of the subject immovable properties as mentioned in Schedule of Properties to the petition, as surety. From the record it appears that the petitioner filed this petition for issuance of Letters of Administration and Succession Certificate in respect of immovable and movable properties left by deceased. The petition was granted vide order dated 18.05.2018. From perusal of record it further appears that this matter has remained non-contentious one despite publication, therefore, the application is granted and the petitioner is allowed to place the original title documents of the subject immoveable properties as surety and whereas for the movable properties are concerned, same be issued upon execution of P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Nazir of this Court. CMA. No.250/2019 is allowed accordingly. JUDGE MUSHARRAF ALI P.A
